title: Top 10 Print Automation Workflow Tools 2026: Esko vs FlowDrive vs SmartDF Review
description: Manual prepress eating profits? Compare 10 automation tools for 2026. Esko, FlowDrive & SmartDF pricing, ROI & workflow features!
content:
Print Automation Workflow Efficiency

Print Automation Workflowis Print Before Production Automation Core，Communication ProcessWorkflow Edit Arrangement、Automation Management、Production IntegrationImplementation Current Document File Management、Pre-inspection、Version、Output Automation。Legacy System Print Before Depend Person Work Workflow Transmission Deliver，Efficiency Low、Easy Output Error。Automation Workflow Will Print Before Workflow Standardization、Automation，Prepress Time Reduce Short70%。

Print Automation Requirements：

  • Document File Management Automation：Document File Upload、Pre-inspection、Repair Repeat Automation
  • Version Automation：Version、Print Standard Record Generate Automation
  • Output Automation：RIP Output、Print Machine Comparison Connection Automation
  • Order Touch Development：Order Automatic Touch Development Print Before Flow

2026 Print Automation Workflow CurrentEsko Automation Engine Packaging Lead First、Flow Drive Main Flow、Smart DFt DF Professional3 Method Format Bureau。

Esko Automation Engine Review

Packaging Print Before Automation Lead Person

Esko Automation Engineis Packaging Print Before Automation Platform，FocusPackaging Print Before Complete Automation。

Core Function

  • Workflow Edit Arrangement：Print Before Workflow Edit Arrangement
  • Automation Management：Document File Pre-inspection、Color Conversion Exchange、Version Automation
  • and Esko Suite Integration：and Artios CAD、Plato、Visualizer Integration
  • MIS Integration：and Print MIS System Comparison Connection
  • Quality Volume Tracking：Prepress Record Tracking

Workflow Edit Arrangement

  • Workflow Step：Pre-inspection、Color Conversion Exchange、Version、Output Step
  • Automation Flow：Document File Automatic Flow Conversion Each Step
  • Item File Division Support：Item File Break Flow Division Support
  • Person Work Step：Person Work Review Core Step

Automation Management

  • Document File Pre-inspection：Automation Document File Pre-inspection
  • Color Conversion Exchange：RGB Automatic Conversion Exchangefor CMYK
  • Version：Automatic Version（Plato Integration）
  • Print Standard Record：Print Standard Record Automatic Generate

and Esko Suite Integration

  • Artios CAD Integration：Packaging Structure Import Automation Flow
  • Plato Integration：Version Automation
  • Visualizer Integration：3 DPre View Automation

MIS Integration

  • JDF/JMF：JDF Order Information Touch Development Automation Flow
  • Order Automatic Touch Development：MIS Order Touch Development Print Before Flow
  • Progress Feedback：Print Before Progress Feedback MIS

User Review Price

Packaging Print Business Recognizes Automation Engine Automation Process Degree High，and Esko Suite Integration Complete。but Price High，Small Packaging Factory Barrier。

Price

  • Automation Engine：$30,000-$50,000 License Available
  • Esko Suite Complete Version：$50,000-$100,000

Flow Drive Review

Main Flow Print Automation Platform

Flow Driveis Main Flow Print Automation Platform，FocusCommercial Print Automation、Easy to Use Department Deploy。

Core Function

  • Workflow Edit Arrangement：Print Before Workflow Edit Arrangement
  • Automation Management：Pre-inspection、Color Conversion Exchange、Version Automation
  • MIS Integration：and EFI Pace、Tharstern Comparison Connection
  • RIP Comparison Connection：and RIP System Comparison Connection
  • Cloud Terminal Department Deploy：Cloud Terminal Automation Service

Workflow Edit Arrangement

  • Visualization Edit Arrangement：Visualization Workflow Edit Arrangement Boundary Surface
  • Pre-designed Template：Pre-designed Print Before Workflow Template
  • Custom Flow：Custom Workflow

Automation Management

  • Pre-inspection Automation：Document File Pre-inspection Automation
  • Color Conversion Exchange：Color Automatic Conversion Exchange
  • Version：Version Automation
  • PDF/XOutput：PDF/XFormat Mode Output

Cloud Terminal Department Deploy

  • Cloud Terminal Automation：Cloud Terminal Automation Service
  • None Need Basic Location Department Deploy：Cloud Terminal Management None Need Basic Location Department Deploy
  • Press Volume Calculation Fee：Press Management Volume Calculation Fee

User Review Price

Commercial Print Business Recognizes Flow Drive Easy to Use、Department Deploy Easy-to-Use，Automation Cover Print Before Core Workflow。Cloud Terminal Department Deploy Suitable for External Package Print Before Market Scenario。

Price

  • Flow Drive Basic Location Version：$15,000-$25,000 License Available
  • Flow Drive Cloud Terminal：$0.05-$0.10/Page Management Fee

Global Graphics Smart DFt DF Review

Professional Automationand RIP Integration

Smart DFt DFis Global Graphics Automation Platform，FocusAutomationand Harlequin RIP Comprehensive Integration。

Core Function

  • Workflow Edit Arrangement：Print Before Workflow Edit Arrangement
  • RIP Integration：and Harlequin RIP Comprehensive Integration
  • Automation Management：Pre-inspection、Color Conversion Exchange Automation
  • Output Optimization：RIP Output Optimization
  • Equipment Comparison Connection：Print Machine Automatic Comparison Connection

RIP Integration Solutionspecial Color

  • Harlequin RIP Integration：Smart DFt DFand Harlequin RIP1 Systemization
  • Automatic RIP：Workflow Automatic Touch Development RIP
  • RIP Optimization：RIP Parameter Data Automatic Optimization
  • Output Monitoring：RIP Output Monitoring

Automation Management

  • Pre-inspection Automation：Document File Pre-inspection Automation
  • Color Conversion Exchange：Color Automatic Conversion Exchange
  • Version：Version Automation（Integration First3 Method）

Equipment Comparison Connection

  • Print Machine Comparison Connection：RIP Output Automatic Comparison Connection Print Machine
  • Output Team List：Output Team List Management
  • Equipment Status：Equipment Status Monitoring

User Review Price

Large Print Business Recognizes Smart DFt DFand Harlequin RIP Integration Complete，Automation+RIP1 Systemization Efficiency High。but Smart DFt DF Need Harlequin RIP Configuration Set，Cost is High。

Price

  • Smart DFt DF：$20,000-$30,000 License Available（Need Harlequin RIP）

2026 Print Automation Trend Estimate

1. AI Automation Decision

AI Automation Decision：AI Break Document File Issue、AI Selection Select Management Solution、AI Optimization Management Parameter Data。Automation Engine Already Research Development AI。

2. Cloud Terminal Automation Common in

Cloud Terminal Automation Service：Flow Drive Cloud Terminal Automation、Document File Cloud Terminal Management、Press Volume Calculation Fee Mode Common in。

3. MIS Comprehensive Integration

Automationand MIS Comprehensive Integration：Order Automatic Touch Development Automation Flow、Progress Real-time Feedback MIS、Customer Data Sync。

4. Automation Expand Display Print After

Automation Expand Display Print After：Print After Workflow Automation Edit Arrangement、Fold Page、Installation Order Automation Flow。

5. Real-time Monitoringand Adjustmentt

Automation Real-time Monitoring：Flow Real-time Monitoring、Difference Common Real-time Adjustmentt、Flow Optimization。

Selection Type Recommendation

  • Packaging Print Before Automation：Esko Automation Engineand Esko Suite Integration Complete，Packaging Automation Professional
  • Commercial Print Automation：Flow Drive Easy to Use、Cloud Terminal Department Deploy Easy-to-Use
  • Harlequin RIP User：Smart DFt DFand Harlequin RIP1 Systemization Efficiency High
  • External Package Print Before Market Scenario：Flow Drive Cloud Terminal Automation Press Volume Calculation Fee
  • Budget Limited：Flow Drive $15 K-$25 KCost Affordable

Print Automation Workflow Selection Type Need Consider Print Category Type（Packagingvs Commercial）、RIP System、MIS Integration Requirements、Budget。Start with Flow Drive Start，Packaging Market Scenario Upgrade Level Automation Engine。
author: Print Automation Expert
